title: Demo 3: equivalent dame loops reduced to one move.
description:
Demo 3: equivalent dame loops reduced to one move.

The white dame on E8 is surrounded by six black pions. It can travel around
the ring in either direction, but both routes have the same endpoints and use
the same set of intermediate landing squares. They are therefore one legal
move, represented by the first generated route:

  E8 -> F7 -> G6 -> F5 -> E4 -> D3 -> C2 -> B3 -> A4 -> B5 -> C6 -> D7 -> E8

In the REPL, try:
  > e8 e8
The move applies immediately without asking for a route index.
